params.name: Monkey Medal
params.description: The Yunnan Snub-nosed Monkey Conservation Medal is an honorary award established to recognize individuals and organizations that have made outstanding contributions to the conservation of the Yunnan snub-nosed monkey. The medal is instituted by the Yunnan Green Environment Development Foundation with the aim of raising public awareness about this species.
